positive: An abstract celestial creature, combining the elegance of a deep-sea nebula with the form of a mythical griffin. The composition is a striking, symmetrical silhouette centered on the chest, set against a highly saturated, cosmic void background. The creature is rendered in tones of electric sapphire blue, iridescent pearl white, and glowing cyan accents, with geometricized, flowing feather-like edges. Use a limited, high-contrast color palette that pops on fabric. Cinematic macro shot, deep depth of field, ultra-detailed, ink drawing style, clean lines, suitable for vinyl transfer.
